steps.title: Estimate the intercept
steps.content: The line of best fit crosses the vertical axis near $16{,}000$. That leaves the choices whose constant term is close to $16{,}000$.

steps.title: Estimate the slope
steps.content:
Use two readable points, such as approximately $(0,16{,}000)$ and $(5,40{,}000)$.
$$
\frac{40{,}000-16{,}000}{5-0}=4{,}800
$$

steps.title: Choose the matching model
steps.content: The model with intercept near $16{,}000$ and slope near $4{,}800$ is $n=16{,}090+4{,}680t$. The answer is A.
